# Personas Registry

<!-- Auto-updated by /persona add — do not edit manually -->

## /persona subcommands

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| `/persona list` | Show this registry |
| `/persona find <req>` | Semantic search across all personas and Ruflo agents |
| `/persona add <name>` | Wire up a BMAD persona as an active slash command |

---

## Project Skills

| Skill | Description |
|---|---|
| `lyra` | Generate precise coding prompts — clarifies package & scope first, saves to `ai/local/task/` |

---

## BMAD Personas (slash commands)

 1. /analyst          — 🔍 research, brainstorming, competitive analysis, project briefs
 2. /architect        — 🛠️  system design, architecture docs, technology selection, API design
 3. /bmad-master      — 👑 universal task execution, cross-domain BMAD expertise
 4. /bmad-orchestrator — 🎭 workflow coordination & guidance, BMAD method orchestration
 5. /dev              — 💻 story implementation, full-stack development, debugging, refactoring
 6. /pm               — 🎯 PRD creation, product strategy, feature prioritization, roadmaps
 7. /po               — ✅ story refinement, backlog prioritization, acceptance criteria
 8. /qa               — 🧪 test architect, quality gates, code improvement, risk assessment
 9. /sm               — 📝 story creation, enhancement, decomposition
10. /ux-expert        — 🎨 UI/UX design, user experience optimization, frontend specs

---

## Ruflo Agents (Agent tool: subagent_type="<name>")

| Category | Agents |
|---|---|
| **analysis** | `analyze-code-quality`, `code-analyzer` |
| **architecture** | `arch-system-design` |
| **consensus** | `byzantine-coordinator`, `crdt-synchronizer`, `gossip-coordinator`, `performance-benchmarker`, `quorum-manager`, `raft-manager`, `security-manager` |
| **core** | `coder`, `planner`, `researcher`, `reviewer`, `tester` |
| **development** | `dev-backend-api` |
| **devops** | `ops-cicd-github` |
| **documentation** | `docs-api-openapi` |
| **flow-nexus** | `authentication`, `app-store`, `challenges`, `neural-network`, `payments`, `sandbox`, `swarm`, `user-tools`, `workflow` |
| **github** | `code-review-swarm`, `pr-manager`, `swarm-issue`, `swarm-pr`, `release-manager`, `release-swarm`, `repo-architect`, `issue-tracker`, `multi-repo-swarm`, `sync-coordinator`, `workflow-automation`, `github-modes`, `project-board-sync` |
| **goal** | `goal-planner` |
| **optimization** | `benchmark-suite`, `load-balancer`, `performance-monitor`, `resource-allocator`, `topology-optimizer` |
| **sparc** | `architecture`, `pseudocode`, `refinement`, `specification` |
| **sublinear** | `consensus-coordinator`, `matrix-optimizer`, `pagerank-analyzer`, `performance-optimizer`, `trading-predictor` |
| **swarm** | `adaptive-coordinator`, `hierarchical-coordinator`, `mesh-coordinator` |
| **templates** | `base-template-generator`, `sparc-coordinator`, `task-orchestrator`, `memory-coordinator`, `sparc-coder` |
| **testing** | `production-validator`, `tdd-london-swarm` |
| **v3** | `security-architect`, `security-auditor`, `pii-detector`, `aidefence-guardian`, `ddd-domain-expert`, `performance-engineer`, `memory-specialist`, `sparc-orchestrator`, `reasoningbank-learner`, `adr-architect` |
